title: Adding columns in between other columns
excerpt: Is there any way to specify the position we would like a new column to be in?  I would like to be able to add a column somewhere in the middle of my board, between other columns (or at least to be able to move it via the…

posts.author: Msh (Moshe Sherman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there any way to specify the position we would like a new column to be in? I would like to be able to add a column somewhere in the middle of my board, between other columns (or at least to be able to move it via the api), rather than being forced to have it only at the end.

Cheers!

posts.author: LaurentConroux (Laurent Conroux)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Msh,

There is an “Add column to the right” row in the column header menu, on every column.

With this you can choose where the column will be created.

Cheers,
Laurent

posts.author: Msh (Moshe Sherman)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks. I was actually interested in whether it was possible via the API. Do you know about this?
